description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this pair of briefs from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you an effortlessly curvy look in your body-hugging outfits. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsPink briefs with lace styling at the front waistbandScalloped edges at the side of the seat regionElasticated waistband and leg holes (high cut)Material and CareLace, blended fabricHand wash, drip dry in shadeDo not wring, iron, bleachWash dark colours separately
